metadata.description: Required. A unique prefix for all resources in this deployment (3-20 chars).
Optional. Azure location for the solution. Defaults to the resource group location.
Optional. A unique token for the solution. Used to ensure resource names are unique.
Optional. GPT model deployment type.
Optional. Name of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the GPT model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the GPT model deployment.
Optional. Name of the Text Embedding model to deploy.
Optional. Version of the Text Embedding model to deploy.
Optional. Capacity of the Text Embedding model deployment.
Optional. Existing Log Analytics Workspace Resource ID.
Optional. Tags to apply to all deployed Azure resources.
Optional. Enable monitoring (LAW + App Insights + diagnostics). Defaults to false.
Optional. Enable redundancy (zone-redundancy, HA failover). Defaults to false.
Optional. Enable scalability (larger search SKU, etc.). Defaults to false.
Optional. Accepted for signature parity with the AVM flavor. Vanilla Microsoft.* resources have no telemetry hook, so this is a no-op in the bicep flavor.
Required. Azure region for AI Foundry / OpenAI deployment.
Optional. User identifier embedded in resource group tags.
Solution name used for resource naming.
Name of the managed identity.
Azure region for the resource.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Resource ID of the managed identity.
Principal ID (object ID) of the managed identity.
Client ID of the managed identity.
Name of the managed identity.
Solution name suffix used to derive the resource name.
Optional. Override name for the Log Analytics workspace. Defaults to log-{solutionName}.
Azure region for the resource.
Tags to apply to the resource.
Retention period in days.
SKU name for the workspace.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.
Name of the Log Analytics workspace.
Location of the workspace.
Log Analytics workspace customer ID.

parameters.workspaceResourceId: [if(variables('useExistingLogAnalytics'), createObject('value', extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('existingLawSubscriptionId'), variables('existingLawResourceGroupName')), 'Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', variables('existingLawName'))), if(parameters('enableMonitoring'), createObject('value', reference('logAnalyticsWorkspace').outputs.resourceId.value), createObject('value', '')))]

properties.locations: [if(and(parameters('zoneRedundant'), not(empty(parameters('haLocation')))), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', true()), createObject('locationName', parameters('haLocation'), 'failoverPriority', 1, 'isZoneRedundant', true())), createArray(createObject('locationName', parameters('location'), 'failoverPriority', 0, 'isZoneRedundant', parameters('zoneRedundant'))))]
